parameters.subject: =Your Resume Analysis is Ready ✓
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $json.fullName }},

Thank you for submitting your resume. Here is your detailed analysis:

👤 Name: {{ $json.candidate_name }}

💼 Current Role: {{ $json.current_role }}

📅 Experience: {{ $json.experience }}

🛠 Top Skills: {{ $json.top_skills.join(' · ') }}

⭐ Rating: {{ $json.score_label }}

📋 Summary:
{{ $json.summary }}

✅ Strengths:

    {{ $json.strengths.map(s => '
  • ' + s + '
    • ').join('') }}

📈 Areas to Improve:

    {{ $json.improvements.map(i => '
  • ' + i + '
    • ').join('') }}

We will be in touch soon!

Best regards,
HR Team
